title: Blog
lead: Notes on building LetterLab, writing systems, and interface decisions. Posts are written to be useful, not promotional.

seo.title: Blog | LetterLab
seo.description: Updates and notes from the LetterLab team.

items.title: Why we focus on writing systems
items.summary: LetterLab is built around predictable structure: purpose first, context next, action at the end. Here’s how that shapes the product.

items.title: Tone control without overfitting
items.summary: We added formal, neutral, and friendly presets to keep output consistent without locking you into a single voice.

items.title: Plain text and email clients
items.summary: Why we default to plain text and simple formatting, and how to avoid surprises when pasting into Gmail or Outlook.

items.title: Constraints that help
items.summary: Visible limits and clear options reduce decision fatigue. We’re designing for clarity, not feature count.

items.title: LetterLab launch
items.summary: We’re shipping an early version focused on drafting, tone, and integration. Feedback welcome.
